steps.title: Find the minimum height
steps.content:
Complete the square for the parabola:
$$y=x^2+10x+k=(x+5)^2+k-25$$
Because the parabola opens upward, its minimum value is $k-25$.

steps.title: Require no intersection
steps.content:
The system has no real solutions when the parabola's minimum is above the horizontal line $y=-3.5$. Set up and solve that condition:
$$k-25\gt -3.5$$
$$k\gt 21.5$$

steps.title: Choose the least integer
steps.content: Since $k$ is a positive integer, the least integer greater than $21.5$ is $22$. The answer is 22.
